div1.entryFree: William, Christian name of 1) the poet himself: Ven. Ded. Meas. II, 2, 33 Lucr. Ded. Meas. II, 2, 33 2) W. of Hatfield, second son of Edward III: H6B II, 2, 12. H6B II, 2, 12 3) W. of Windsor, seventh son of Edward III: H6B II, 2, 17. 4) W. de la Pole, Earl of Suffolk: H6A II, 4, 80. H6B I, 1, 44. I, 2, 30. 5) Sir W. Glansdale: H6A I, 4, 63. 6) Sir W. Lucy: H6A IV, 4, 10. H6A IV, 4, 10 7) Sir W. Stanley: H6C IV, 5, 1. R3 IV, 5, 10. 8) W. Lord Hastings: R3 III, 1, 162. R3 III, 1, 162 III, 4, 28. 9) Sir W. Courtney: R3 IV, 4, 502 (Ff Edward). 10) Sir W. Brandon: R3 V, 3, 22. V, 5, 14. 11) Sir W. Blomer: H8 I, 2, 190. 12) the young son of Page: Wiv. IV, 1, 17 etc. 13) the son of Justice Silence: H4B III, 2, 11. 14) Justice Shallow's cook: H4B V, 1, 12. H4B V, 1, 12 H4B V, 1, 12 H4B V, 1, 12 15) W. Visor: H4B V, 1, 42. 16) a young country fellow in As V, 1, 22. As V, 1, 22 As V, 1, 22
